name: workout-program-site
description: Static-site generator for Shaked's workout plan (light, local, Tailscale-served).

scripts.dev: BASE_PATH=/fitness node build.mjs && (SERVER_PORT=3000 node server.mjs &) && SITE_DIST=$(pwd)/dist FITNESS_SERVER_PORT=3000 caddy run --config Caddyfile --adapter caddyfile
